response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and shows no evidence of distributed systems or navigation data optimization work required for the role.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated ability to learn and apply diverse languages including DLang for performance-critical systems
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling across multiple environments
concerns: No demonstrated professional experience with C++ or Rust in routing or navigation systems
Lacks evidence of working on map tiling, routing data pipelines, or real-time traffic integration
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript; minimal mention of Linux systems programming or distributed consistency
